PR-TC-XC-052.title: No green/yellow in the UI (Monsoon Court)
PR-TC-XC-052.actual: Active Entrepreneurs KPI shows a GREEN check rgb(63,107,58) (hue 114). Monsoon Court forbids green — success must be teal #0E4D4E.

PR-TC-XC-053.actual: Form inputs render white (rgb 255,255,255) on the EP form.

PR-TC-XC-054.title: Required marker is a terracotta asterisk
PR-TC-XC-054.actual: Asterisk on the name label is taupe rgb(107,99,89) (inherits label ink-soft), NOT terracotta #C26849. Marker present but wrong colour.

PR-TC-XC-055.actual: Focus ring: programmatic .focus() shows outline-style:none, but that is unreliable for :focus-visible (keyboard) styling — needs a real keyboard-focus observation.

PR-TC-XC-056.actual: Primary button background is teal rgb(14,77,78) = #0E4D4E.

PR-TC-XC-057.actual: Sidebar active nav item: teal bg rgb(14,77,78)=#0E4D4E + cream text rgb(251,245,229)=#FBF5E5.

PR-TC-XC-058.actual: No stat/KPI cards on the tabbed EP form (filters/fields appear directly).

PR-TC-XC-059.actual: Currency uses Indian grouping on the Financials form (e.g. ₹1,45,000, not ₹145,000).

PR-TC-XC-060.actual: Dates render unambiguous DD-MMM-YYYY style (e.g. '20 Apr 2026'). Minor: uses spaces, not hyphens, vs the spec's 20-Apr-2026.

PR-TC-DB-INT-001.actual: OUT OF SCOPE (per user 29 May): Intervention Dashboard is being rebuilt from scratch with the KPI form — do not test the current version.

PR-TC-DB-MS-001.actual: Milestone Tracker shows 4 tabs (Overview / Milestones & Activities / Timeline / RACI Matrix) + Live Data banner (85 activities, 26 milestones).

PR-TC-DB-EPS-002.actual: Landscape filters (Sector/Basket/Cohort/Stage/Status) present; filter param persists in URL across reload (per XC-009).

PR-TC-DB-EPS-001.actual: Landscape KPI cards are Total/Active/GPS-Verified/Districts/Village — NOT the spec's Total/MET/Incubated/Supported. Confirm which view is the canonical 'EP Status Monitor' before flagging.

PR-TC-DB-EPS-003.actual: Status-pill colours need the dedicated status-monitor view; the green-KPI violation is already raised as XC-052.

PR-TC-DB-EPS-004.actual: Zero-records empty state — needs a filter-to-zero observation pass.

PR-TC-DB-SAN-001.actual: OUT OF SCOPE (per user 29 May): Sankey de-prioritized — skip for now.

PR-TC-DB-SAN-002.actual: OUT OF SCOPE (per user 29 May): Sankey de-prioritized — skip for now.
